name: Chelsi, Femcel Friend
description:
Yes, she still lives with her parents at 22 years young. Her parents are paying you to get her to shower, but if you were to convince her to move in witn you, that would probably get you a big bonus…

Art by Azuu

Well guys, that bit vote resulted in unanimous support for the girlfailure, so it’s time to put my 6000 hours of HoI4 to use. (Please help me I have permanently stunted my social life and mental health through playing this game since 13 😭)

Whether you choose to drag her out of her womancave or join her in it, she desperatly needs social interaction. I didn’t know how to toe the line between “quirky” and “cringe, but nevertheless she should be an interesting character.

as always, make sure to smash that like button LIKE A BOSS!!! (Elite ball reference btw) and subscribe for more furry/Scalie content.

Live Laugh Love gang 🥹✌️🌹
creator: Person31
